title: Resident Technical Officer with Supervision of Mining Experience (RTO)
description:
To carry out construction supervision of construction works as required under the BCA regulations and ensure that the design documentation is safely and accurately implemented on site.

Responsible for the co-ordination of work on site and ensure construction safety.

Undertake any other duties related to the project assigned.

To ensure that all installation methods and material used are in accordance with the contract drawings and specifications.

To liaise with the contractors in the coordination of site works and resolving site installation problems.

Maintain a daily site records and submit weekly progress report with photographs to the Consultant/Project Lead.

To proactively highlight issue and any unusual site findings to the Consultant/Project Lead to ensure solutions or directions are given in a timely manner.

Able to work under pressure with ability to work independently

Requirements:

Minimum Diploma in Civil Engineering or equivalent from Singapore Polytechnic or other tertiary institutions of equivalent standing/ be accredited by JAC of IES / ACES as QSS.

minimum 3 Years of experience in nature to Works in Civil Contracts and Experience in Supervision of Mining works

National Certificate on Construction Supervision from BCA or equivalent preferred.

Familiar with local codes and regulations, as well as technical knowledge.

Proficient in MS Word, Excel and Project for project update and report.

Full time

RE (Civil) x 2 vacancy available

RTO (civil) x 8 vacancy available

RTO (archi) x 1 vacancy available

postedCompany.description:
Estabilished in 2023 and growing business with passionate team members lead by Er Cavan Chai.

The collective strength of CVC is built on the diverse skills in various Civil and
Structural  disciplines.  We  collaborate  extensively  with  professionals  from
different  fields,  including  architects,  Mechanical,  Electrical,  Geotehnical  
Professional  Engineers  (PE),  and  Registered  Surveyors,  to  offer  integrated
solutions.  CVC's  team  holds  several  prestigious  certifications,  including
Qualified  Erosion  Control  Professional  (QECP),  Structural  Engineer  (SE)  for
Structural  Inspections,  Competent  Person  (CP)  for  Facade  Inspections,  and
Design for Safety Professional (DfSP).
postedCompany.name: CVC ENGINEERS PTE. LTD.
